hero.title: Contact Vericore
hero.subtitle: Whether you have a question about your application, a problem with the tool, or want to discuss a white-label licence, we are here.
info.title: Ways to Reach Us

response.title: Response Times
privacy_note: All communications are encrypted and handled in line with GDPR and NDPA principles. We never share your data with third parties.
